headline: BofA sees more upside in Eli Lilly stock
summary: Eli Lilly’s first-quarter report gave Wall Street another reason to stay optimistic about one of the market’s biggest pharmaceutical winners, even as analysts continue to weigh how much growth is already priced into the stock. headline: Weight loss and hair loss: The growing hair treatment market from GLP-1s
summary: A common side effect of many GLP-1 drugs is hair loss. It's creating a formerly untapped but growing market for hair treatment products.

headline: How GLP-1s are helping the hair care industry
summary: As more people take GLP-1s, many are experiencing side effects like hair loss. This is creating brand new opportunities for hair care companies, injecting a much needed boost into an industry that's been stagnant for years. CNBC's Laya Neelakandan looks into that growth.

headline: Eli Lilly and Company Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE:LLY) executives said the drugmaker started 2026 with “a strong start,” pointing to sharp first-quarter revenue growth, continued demand for its incretin medicines, a newly approved oral obesity therapy, and a slate of pipeline and business development milestones. Founday
